reviews.review_title: Tactical tag is a great game!
reviews.review_description: The Tactical Tag is my favorite game from it providing tons fun, fun gameplay and a type of community of players. What makes it my favorite, a unique feature of long arms, who plays this game, and an impressive amount of cosmetics to customize your body. Whether you are competing or just chatting with others, there is never a moment where you will be left out.

Ive met the owner a multitude of times and every time he is very kind and respectful he is kinda quiet sometimes but hes a really good owner. The staff are amazing really kind and the community is amazing i love this game! Five stars
